description: SOW Generator: Three scope agents propose independent SOW options, risk and pricing agents evaluate each, synthesis lead creates final deliverable with 3 client-ready packages and comparison table

agents.name: scope-agent-a
agents.role: Conservative scope interpretation - minimize risk, deliver core value

agents.name: scope-agent-b
agents.role: Balanced scope interpretation - optimize value-to-effort ratio

agents.name: scope-agent-c
agents.role: Ambitious scope interpretation - maximize impact and deliverables

agents.name: risk-agent
agents.role: Identify and assess risks for each proposed scope option

agents.name: pricing-agent
agents.role: Cost estimation and value-for-money analysis for each proposed scope option

agents.name: sow-lead
agents.role: Synthesize evaluated proposals into final SOW document with 3 named client packages
